kirundi.the_earliest_fraction_notation_dates_t: Icandiko ca mbere c'igice kiva muri Misiri ya kera hafi ya 1800 BCE. Abanyamisiri bakoresheje "ibice vy'unite" — gusa ibice bifise igiharuro co hejuru 1 (nka 1/2, 1/3, 1/4). Banditse igice ico ari co cose nk'igiteranyo c'ibice vy'unite: 2/5 = 1/3 + 1/15. Icandiko c'umurongo c'ubu (igiharuro co hejuru hejuru y'igiharuro co hasi) kiva ku bahinga mu mibare b'Abarabu bo hagati hafi ya 1200 CE.
kirundi.numerator_comes_from_the_latin_numerar: "Numerator" iva mu Kilatini "numerare" (kubara) — ibara ibice bingahe. "Denominator" iva mu "denominare" (kwita) — yita ubunini bw'ibice. Hamwe: igiharuro co hasi cita ubwoko bw'ibice; igiharuro co hejuru kibara ibice bingahe muri ivyo ufise.
kirundi.decimals_as_we_know_them_were_populari: Decimal nk'uko tuyizi yakwiragijwe na Simon Stevin mu 1585 mu gitabu ciwe "De Thiende" (Ica Cumi). Imbere y'ivyo, ibice vyari bwo buryo bwonyene bwo kwerekana ibiharuro bituzuye. Akadomo ka decimal kemewe ku isi yose gusa mu myaka ya 1700.
kirundi.percent_comes_from_the_latin_per_centu: "Percent" iva mu Kilatini "per centum" — "kuri ijana." Rero 25% bisobanura 25 kuri 100, canke 25/100. Ikimenyetso % cakuze kiva ku majambo magufi "per c." mu vyandiko vy'ubudandaji vy'Abataliyani vyo mu kinjana ca 15.
kirundi.the_reciprocal_of_a_b_is_b_a_flip_it_u: Reciprocal ya a/b ni b/a — hindukiza. Buri gice kitari zeru gifise reciprocal. Igiterekano c'igice na reciprocal yaco buri gihe ni 1: (3/4) × (4/3) = 12/12 = 1. Ni co gituma kugabura n'igice ari kimwe no kugwiza na reciprocal yaco.
kirundi.why_is_1_2_the_most_used_fraction: Kubera iki 1/2 ari igice gikoreshwa cane?
kirundi.1_2_is_the_most_common_fraction_in_eve: 1/2 ni igice gisanzwe cane mu majambo ya buri musi kuko kiri hagati neza ya 0 na 1. Ni na co gice conyene tuvuga mu majambo: "igice kimwe kabiri" aho kuvuga "kimwe hejuru ya kabiri." Izindi ndimi zifise amajambo yihariye ku 1/3 na 1/4 nazo (ica gatatu, ica kane).
kirundi.a_pizza_is_a_perfect_fraction_model_be: Pizza ni icitegererezo c'igice gitunganye kuko ari uruziga (rero ibice vyose biva mu kigazi), ibice vyoroshe kubara, kandi icitegererezo gihuye n'insobanuro z'imibare zisanzwe: igice n/d ni n ibice bingana muri byose d ibice bingana.
kirundi.some_numbers_like_and_2_cannot_be_writ: Ibiharuro bimwe, nka π na √2, ntibishobora kwandikwa nk'igice c'ibiharuro bibiri vyuzuye. Ivyo vyitwa ibiharuro bitagira ishingiro. Aba-Pythagore (hafi ya 500 BCE) bavuga ko biciye umuhinga mu mibare Hippasus igihe yerekana ko √2 idashobora kwandikwa nk'igice.
kirundi.any_real_number_can_be_written_as_a_co: Igiharuro nyakuri ico ari co cose gishobora kwandikwa nka "igice gibandanya" — igice kiri imbere nka 1 + 1/(2 + 1/(2 + 1/(2 + ...))). Ivyo bitanga ibigereranyo vy'igice vyiza cane. π ≈ 22/7 kuva ku majambo makeya ya mbere; iciza cane ni 355/113.
kirundi.musical_pitch_ratios_are_fractions_the: Ibiharuro vy'ijwi ry'umuziki ni ibice. Octave ni igiharuro 2:1 (frequency yikuba kabiri). Ica gatanu gitunganye ni 3:2. Ica gatatu kinini ni 5:4. Pythagoras yavumbuye ko ibiharuro vy'ibiharuro vyuzuye vyoroshe bitanga amajwi ahuza.
kirundi.why_the_common_denominator: Kubera iki igiharuro co hasi gisangiwe?
kirundi.two_pizzas_can_only_be_combined_if_the: Pizza zibiri zishobora guhuzwa gusa nimba zaciwe mu bice vy'ubunini bumwe. Igiharuro co hasi gitandukanye = ibice vy'ubunini butandukanye = ntibishobora guhuzwa ako kanya. Igiharuro co hasi gisangiwe bisobanura neza "ibice vy'ubunini bumwe."
kirundi.a_batting_average_like_333_means_1_3_o: Impuzandengo yo gukubita nka .333 bisobanura 1/3 vy'ibikubitwa bitanga igikubita. ERA y'uwuterera, kw'ijana bwo kuba-ku-base, kw'ijana bwo gukubita — vyose ni ibice. Baseball ni wo mukino wa mbere wamamaje ubwoko bw'iki ciyumviro c'imibare, guhera mu myaka ya 1850.
kirundi.georges_cuisenaire_was_a_belgian_prima: Georges Cuisenaire yari umwigisha w'amashure abanza w'Umubiligi mu myaka ya 1950 yaremye inkoni z'amabara zifise uburebure 1 gushika 10 kugira ngo afashe abana gufata isano y'ibiharuro harimwo ibice. "Uruhome rw'igice" ubona mu mashure menshi ni umwana wa digital w'inkoni ziwe zifatika.
kirundi.the_chinese_mathematical_text_nine_cha: Icandiko c'imibare c'Ubushinwa "Ibice Icenda ku Buhinga bw'Imibare" (hafi ya 100 BCE) cari gifise kubara ibice, harimwo uburyo bwo kurondera ibiharuro vyo hasi bisangiwe bihuye mu mibare n'ivyo twigisha uyu musi.
kirundi.computers_store_decimal_fractions_in_b: Mudasobwa zibika ibice vya decimal muri binary. Decimal 0.1 ntishobora kwerekanwa neza muri binary — iba igice gisubiramwo muri base 2. Ni co gituma 0.1 + 0.2 rimwe na rimwe bitanga 0.30000000000000004 mu ndimi za porogaramu.
kirundi.dogs_spend_about_1_2_their_lives_sleep: Imbwa zimara hafi ya 1/2 vy'ubuzima bwazo ziryamye. Imbwa y'imyaka 12 yaryamye hafi imyaka 6.
kirundi.cats_sleep_about_2_3_of_every_day_that: Injangwe ziryama hafi ya 2/3 vy'umusi wose. Ni amasaha 16 buri musi.
kirundi.elephants_drink_about_1_8_of_their_bod: Inzovu zinywa hafi ya 1/8 vy'uburemere bwazo mu mazi buri musi. Inzovu y'ibiro 12,000 inywa amazi y'ibiro 1,500!
kirundi.a_blue_whale_s_tongue_weighs_about_1_2: Ururimi rw'inyanja y'ubururu rufise uburemere hafi ya 1/2 vy'imodoka nto (~ibiro 6,000).

kirundi.let_your_number_be_n_the_sequence_n_1_: Reka igiharuro cawe cibe n. Urukurikirane: (n+1) × 2 + 4 − 6 = 2n + 2 + 4 − 6 = 2n. Gabura na 2 → n. Kuramwo ic'intango → 0. Rindira — ivyo bitanga 0, atari 1. Gerageza: n → (n+1)×2 = 2n+2 → +4 = 2n+6 → −6 = 2n → ÷2 = n → −ic'intango = 0. "Uburyo" bwishimikira ku ma-constant yinyegeje mu rukurikirane.
kirundi.each_term_is_half_the_previous_the_tot: Buri jambo ni igice kimwe kabiri c'iryabanje. Igiteranyo cegera 1 ariko ntigishika na rimwe. Uru ni urukurikirane rwa geometric rutagira iherezo rufise ijambo rya mbere 1/2 n'igiharuro 1/2: S = (1/2) / (1 − 1/2) = 1. Ni co gituma paradox y'ivyokugenda ya Zeno ishobora gutororwa mu mibare.
kirundi.even_though_each_term_is_small_the_ser: Naho buri jambo ari rito, urukurikirane rurasakara. Kugira ngo urenge 100, ukeneye hafi 1.5 × 10^43 amajambo. Ivyo vyerekanywe na Nicole Oresme mu myaka ya 1300 akoresheje gukusanya: 1/3 + 1/4 > 1/4 + 1/4 = 1/2; 1/5+...+1/8 > 4 × 1/8 = 1/2; ushobora buri gihe kurondera 1/2 iyindi yo kongerako.
kirundi.check_1_4_and_1_3_4_1_1_3_1_check_2_5_: Raba 1/4 na 1/3: (4)(1) − (1)(3) = 1. Raba 2/5 na 1/2: (5)(1) − (2)(2) = 1. Iyi ngeso ikora igiti ca Stern-Brocot c'ibiharuro vyose vya rationnel.
kirundi.rewrite_1_2_2_3_3_4_n_1_n_the_2_in_2_3: Subira wandike: 1/2 × 2/3 × 3/4 × ... × (n−1)/n. 2 muri 2/3 isiba 2 mu giharuro co hasi ca 1/2. 3 muri 3/4 isiba 3 mu giharuro co hasi ca 2/3. Vyose birasibwa dukuyemwo 1/n.
kirundi.mathematical_tricks_that_are_really_el: "Uburyo" bw'imibare buri koko ari ibiranga vy'igice vyiza. Hitamwo bumwe kugira ngo urabe iteguriro, kwerekana, n'insobanuro z'imibare.
